mapper.sql: id, event_id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, attempt_no, schema_version, payload_json, priority, status, publish_attempts, next_attempt_at, claimed_by, claimed_at, last_error, occurred_at, published_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM outbox_event WHERE event_id = #{eventId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM outbox_event WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND next_attempt_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) ORDER BY next_attempt_at, created_at, id LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update:
UPDATE outbox_event SET status = 'SENDING', claimed_by = #{publisherId}, claimed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), publish_attempts = publish_attempts + 1, last_error = NULL WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND id IN
#{id}

UPDATE outbox_event SET status = 'PENDING', next_attempt_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), claimed_by = NULL, claimed_at = NULL, last_error = #{errorMessage} WHERE status = 'SENDING' AND ( claimed_at IS NULL OR claimed_at < TIMESTAMPADD(SECOND, -#{leaseSeconds}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3)) )

UPDATE outbox_event SET status = 'PUBLISHED', published_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), claimed_by = NULL, claimed_at = NULL, last_error = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'SENDING' AND claimed_by = #{publisherId}
